span.p:
Human defines task
unit, category, artifact, context

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Use prompt library
with source concepts and output contract

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Structured output
summary, assumptions,
unknowns, artifact,
sales, RevOps, risks

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Reject
too broad, SaaS-like,
or not industrial

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reject
confidentiality or invented evidence risk

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Repair
add fit, role, state,
signal, owner, proof

span.p:
Final artifact
ready for critique or capstone

capstone, or weekly cadence
